text:
LABEL: CHIP Enrollment Days — January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: Number of days of CHIP enrollment in the month. There are separate variables for each of the 12 
months during the year. 

SHORT NAME: CHIP_ENRLMT_DAYS_01

CHIP_ENRLMT_DAYS_10 
CHIP_ENRLMT_DAYS_11 
CHIP_ENRLMT_DAYS_12 

LONG NAME: CHIP_ENRLMT_DAYS_01
